prompt: Keep the draft inside Enron, ask Gerald Nemec and Sara Shackleton for review, and hold the outside send.
summary: Instead of sending the draft Master Agreement to Cargill, Debra retains the draft inside Enron and requests internal review from Gerald Nemec and Sara Shackleton. External transmission is held pending internal sign-off.

messages.subject: Master Agreement — Internal Draft for Review
messages.body_text:
Gerald,

Attached is a draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement (Enron North America / Cargill). Please review for commercial terms, risk allocation and any negotiation points. Do not forward outside Enron — I am holding sending to Cargill until we have internal sign‑off. Please return redlines/comments by end of week so I can consolidate.

Regards,
Debra
messages.rationale: Obtain commercial and risk review from internal counterparty lead before any external distribution to Cargill.

messages.subject: Master Agreement — Legal/Credit Review (Internal)
messages.body_text:
Sara,

I'm keeping the Master Agreement draft inside Enron for now. Please review for legal and credit issues and flag any provisions that need credit approval or redrafting. Do not forward externally; I will compile internal comments and coordinate before any contact with Cargill.

Thanks,
Debra
messages.rationale: Secure legal and credit input to ensure the agreement is ready for external negotiation and to centralize approval.

top_subjects: Master Agreement — Internal Draft for Review
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
